ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "dc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "dc_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data center */,
  "dc_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data center */,
  "dc_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the data center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "dc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data center where the server is located */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "total_memory" INTEGER /* Total memory capacity of the server in MB */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the server */,
  "last_reboot_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last server reboot */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Uptime of the server in seconds */,
  "last_memory_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last memory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_dc_id FOREIGN KEY ("dc_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("dc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., VSDCMIN, VSDCMAX) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric value */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_metrics_metric_type FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., VSDCMIN, VSDCMAX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format of the metric (e.g., floating, binary) */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "metric_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the metric is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric type the threshold is set for */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message to be triggered when the threshold is exceeded */,
  "threshold_status" TEXT /* Status of the threshold */,
  "threshold_notification" TEXT /* Notification method when the threshold is exceeded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_thresholds_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert event */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the alert was triggered */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory metric that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_notification" TEXT /* Method of notification for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES memory_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, operator) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in JSON format */,
  "generate_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
